message:
chore: apply cargo fmt to fix CI format check

Apply rustfmt to resolve formatting issues caught by CI:
- Reorder imports alphabetically in control.rs and lib.rs
- Wrap long lines in render_png_offscreen() for readability
- Convert render_png_offscreen() from SimulationView method to standalone function
- Remove unused cli parameter in run_det_check()
- Clean up import comments
